subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-05-02
subcodes.first_line: The individuals of the world of humanity are in different degrees. They are like unto candlesticks.... Similarly there are some enkindled souls whose very presence in a meeting changes its atmosphere
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @light and darkness, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @being a source of light; guidance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
